---
title: "Notes on Tools"
date: 2026-03-08
description: "A short reflection on how the tools we use shape the work we produce."
categories: [craft, short]
---

*This is a placeholder essay. Replace this content with your own writing.*

Every craftsperson has opinions about their tools. Writers argue about text editors; photographers argue about cameras; developers argue about languages and frameworks.

## The tool shapes the work

There's a version of this argument that says "a good craftsperson doesn't blame their tools." That's true. But there's a complementary truth: the affordances of a tool quietly shape what you make with it.

Writing in Markdown encourages structure. Writing in a rich text editor encourages flowing prose. Neither is better — they're different.

## Placeholder section

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Pellentesque habitant morbi tristique senectus et netus et malesuada fames ac turpis egestas.

---

*More coming soon.*
